title: HakminePiece
body:
When using this mod on YouTube, please include a link to Modrinth in the description.

Youtubeでこのmodをご使用頂く場合、概要欄にModrinthのリンクを必ず貼ってください


Use of internal data such as textures and models is PROHIBITED.
テクスチャやモデルなどの内部データの使用は禁止されています。


For forge 1.20.1

First of all, the Mine Piece mod is in Forge. And the Hak Mine Piece mod is an add-on to Mine Piece.

〇 Key Settings
Y : Switch to devil fruit1/devil fruit2 technique

M : Stats/Settings menu
G : Toggle Armament Haki

Add Custom Techniques
・Add Gaban technique

・Add Curiel technique

・Add Fossa technique

・Add Blueno technique

・Add Black Beard technique

[Requre Mod] 
playerAnimator
GeckoLib
Kleiders Custom Renderer API
Minepiece
